title: Location column intermittently stops populating addresses
excerpt: We have our job location in the sub-items and very randomly when we type in an address is will not populate a clickable address to pull up the map, it will just add it as if the location column were just a text box. No m…

posts.author: Johnsa9 (Ashley Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have our job location in the sub-items and very randomly when we type in an address is will not populate a clickable address to pull up the map, it will just add it as if the location column were just a text box. No matter if I refresh or anything it continues to do it. Again, only sometimes and always random! Later on I can try again and it will work… like days later.

Note: Yes to the following
-it’s an actual address
-we use this all the time
-the board is created from a template
-it happens to everyone

anyone else have this issue?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! This definitely sounds odd and we’d love to investigate this to see if it’s a bug. Would you mind sending our technical support engineers an email at support@monday.com so they can take a look?

posts.author: Johnsa9 (Ashley Morrison)
posts.cookedHtml: The next time it happens I will.
